name: Defender
overview: A legendary melee weapon that can transfer attack bonuses to Armor Class.

properties.attack_bonus: You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon

defensive_transfer.description: The first time you attack with the weapon on each of your turns, you can transfer some or all of the weapon's bonus to your Armor Class
defensive_transfer.example: For example, you could reduce the bonus to your attack rolls and damage rolls to +1 and gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class
defensive_transfer.duration: The adjusted bonuses remain in effect until the start of your next turn, although you must hold the weapon to gain a bonus to AC from it
